best_extraction.authors: Soulas T, Gurruchaga JM, Palfi S, Cesaro P, Nguyen JP, Fénelon G
best_extraction.title: Attempted and completed suicides after subthalamic nucleus stimulation for Parkinson's disease
best_extraction.study_question: Prevalence and characteristics of suicide after STN DBS in Parkinson's disease
best_extraction.population_assessed: 200 Parkinson's disease patients undergoing bilateral STN DBS at one center
best_extraction.follow_up_duration: Mean 12 months after surgery; study period 1997-2006
best_extraction.outcome_measures: Completed suicide, attempted suicide, depression, cognitive status, impulse regulation
best_extraction.inclusion_criteria: Parkinson's disease patients undergoing bilateral STN DBS at a single center
best_extraction.answer_to_study_question: Two patients completed suicide and four attempted; events linked to postoperative depression and impulse dysregulation.

reasoning: Strong agreement across models on core bibliographic fields, DOI, PubMed, design, and sample size. Chose issue 9 and full journal title from higher-confidence Anthropic output; other fields merged from consensus.

field_level_decisions.volume_issue_pages: Anthropic and article metadata most plausible over OpenRouter's issue 8 and Gemini's issue omission.
field_level_decisions.follow_up_duration: Used merged consensus: mean 12 months plus study period 1997-2006.
field_level_decisions.answer_to_study_question: Used detailed counts from Anthropic and Gemini rather than OpenRouter's summarized 3%.
